name: Filter Example One Highres Review FixHeight v1
conclusions: The current low-cost satisfying anchor is not automatically promotable to a formal high-resolution anchor.

adjacent_coupling_gap = 1.15 mm is the closest high-resolution continuation of the low-cost anchor because it preserves the center frequency and the high-side-zero locality while only missing the bandwidth tolerance slightly.
Therefore the PPO reset center should remain the low-cost fixheight anchor, while the high-resolution template is used as a periodic referee rather than the first-stage training template.
